original_image_tags: scan of a blank, aged manila file folder, orange-brown in color. The folder shows signs of wear, with creases, a torn edge along the top, and three staple holes near the top center. The background is black.

elements.description: Back of a yellowed page with torn staple holes at the top. Handwritten text 'F472 11-23-70' and illegible initials are visible in the bottom left corner.
